name: rf/microstrip_two_port
description: Microstrip quasi-TEM two-port: Z0 / eps_eff vs Hammerstad-Jensen.
notes: BLOCKED. Two stacked blockers, in the order they fire (EXECUTED): (1) the current-contour plane does not land on the Yee half-grid, so compile_waveport_cross_section raises a ValueError (witwin/maxwell/compiler/waveports.py:_compile_current_geometry) BEFORE the mode solve runs -- this snap error currently fires FIRST and masks the TEM check. (2) The deeper categorical blocker: the microstrip cross-section is inhomogeneous (eps=4.4 substrate + air), and WaveModeSpec('tem') is inapplicable there -- the TEM electrostatic normalization requires a uniformly filled cross-section and raises NotImplementedError (witwin/maxwell/fdtd/excitation/modes.py:1943-1946). A hybrid (full-vector) mode solve is required. reference: pending-generation for the wave-level extraction.
